subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: Observe how the power of the Cause of God has created a tumult in the hearts and what a revolution it has produced. See how the aid and assistance of the Abha Beauty have reached us
subcodes.first_line_orig: به بینید چگونه اقتدار امر الله ولوله در دلها انداخت و چه انقلابی در نفوس افکند چه طور عون و عنایت جمال ابهی پی در پی رسید
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the concourse on high, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
